pageSummaryPick: Score analysis: pick an exam on the left
confirmDeleteBatch: Delete this score batch? This cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteExam: Delete this exam and all its score batches? This cannot be undone.
noExams: No exams yet. Export a paper once to see it here.
pickExamLeft: Select a past exam on the left
unboundWarning: {{n}} question(s) are not linked to knowledge nodes
chartQuestionErr: Question error rate (top 20; red = frequent errors)
knowledgeBindHint: Knowledge stats use bound questions; link bank items to the map first.
knowledgeMissingTitle: Knowledge stats missing for unbound items
bindInGraph: Link questions to knowledge nodes on the map, then re-import scores.
diagnosisDeps: Needs graph bindings; after importing scores, click Recompute first.
classWeakTitle: Class weak points (error rate; higher = review first)
noDiagnosisData: No diagnosis data yet. Bind exam questions on the map, then Recompute above.
lossChartTitle: Loss by knowledge point (taller = lower score rate there)
noStudentKData: No per-knowledge data for this student (check graph binding).
practiceDraftTitle: Practice draft (bank questions linked to these points)
practiceHint: You can assemble these ids in Compose; one-click drafts will come later.
noPyScripts: No .py scripts in the analysis folder
emptyBeforeSelect: Select a past exam on the left
